testcase.name: test_stateJson_containsInitialSettlements(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 1
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 16 Player 1: Placed initial road between 16 and 17 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 53 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 15 Player 3: Placed initial road between 15 and 14 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 38 Player 4: Placed initial road between 37 and 38 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 42 Player 4: Placed initial road between 42 and 43 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 40 Player 3: Placed initial road between 40 and 41 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 11 Player 2: Placed initial road between 11 and 12 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 20 Player 1: Placed initial road between 20 and 21
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 3 moved robber to tile 7 No players to steal from. 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed

testcase.name: test_stateJson_isUpdatedAfterEachTurn(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 10
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 40 Player 1: Placed initial road between 39 and 40 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 51 Player 2: Placed initial road between 50 and 51 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 45 Player 3: Placed initial road between 44 and 45 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 43 Player 4: Placed initial road between 42 and 43 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 31 Player 4: Placed initial road between 30 and 31 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 20 Player 3: Placed initial road between 20 and 21 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 37 Player 2: Placed initial road between 37 and 38 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 5 Player 1: Placed initial road between 17 and 5
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 1 moved robber to tile 9 Player 1 stole 1 WOOD from Player 4 1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 3 moved robber to tile 17 Player 3 stole 1 WOOD from Player 4 1 / 3: Built road between 19 and 20 1 / 4: Passed

testcase.name: test_roundJson_createdWithCorrectContent(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 1
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 30 Player 1: Placed initial road between 30 and 31 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 13 Player 2: Placed initial road between 3 and 13 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 34 Player 3: Placed initial road between 34 and 18 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 52 Player 4: Placed initial road between 51 and 52 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 5 Player 4: Placed initial road between 4 and 5 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 10 Player 3: Placed initial road between 10 and 11 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 2 Player 2: Placed initial road between 2 and 3 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 43 Player 1: Placed initial road between 42 and 43
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Built road between 13 and 9 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed -----Round 1 ---- Player 1 VP: 0 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 === GAME OVER (Round 2) === No player reached the points needed to win.

testcase.name: test_stateJson_hasCorrectVisualizerStructure(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 1
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 32 Player 1: Placed initial road between 32 and 15 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 51 Player 2: Placed initial road between 50 and 51 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 36 Player 3: Placed initial road between 34 and 36 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 17 Player 4: Placed initial road between 17 and 5 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 25 Player 4: Placed initial road between 25 and 26 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 13 Player 3: Placed initial road between 12 and 13 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 6 Player 2: Placed initial road between 6 and 24 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 41 Player 1: Placed initial road between 41 and 20
****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 1 moved robber to tile 10 No players to steal from. 1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed -----Round 1 ---- Player 1 VP: 0 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 === GAME OVER (Round 2) === No player reached the points needed to win.
